parameters.formDescription: 仅支持公司内部访问，请勿将链接外传。（请按模板上传，第一列列名为“SN”，否则上传无效）

parameters.query: SELECT uuid from YFConsumer.dbo.consm_barcodeinfo where createtime2 BETWEEN '{{ $json.startdate }}'and '{{ $json.enddate }}';

SELECT 
    r.retroid
FROM 
    mes.machine_data md
JOIN 
    mes.retroid r ON md.retroid_id = r.retroid_id
WHERE 
    md.procedure_detail_id = 79
    AND md.createtime BETWEEN '{{ $json.startdate }}' AND '{{ $json.enddate }}';
